Why this webinar

A real conversation, not a keynote

Every movement starts with a few people who refuse to accept the way things are. Direct specialty care started with physicians who were tired of watching patients wait months for care, get hit with bills no one could explain, and be treated as claims instead of people. So they left, and they built something better.

They refused.
They left.
They built.

This is your chance to meet them, live. Not a polished keynote. A real conversation about why they did it, what it took, what they learned, and where the movement goes next. Bring your questions. This session is built around them.

Who you will meet

The three physicians behind the movement

Dr. Diana Girnita, MD, PhD

Rheumatology · Co-founder, DSC Alliance

Founder of Rheumatologist OnCall. In 2019 she started the first telemedicine company in rheumatology, built on transparent pricing, and has since helped thousands of patients across the United States. She built the Alliance so no physician has to leave the insurance system alone.

Dr. Lara Briseno Kenney

Hematology, Oncology & Palliative Care · Co-founder, DSC Alliance

Co-founder of the DSC Alliance, practicing direct specialty care in rural Clinton, Missouri. A peer-to-peer DSC consultation pioneer, helping other physicians navigate the same leap she made.

Dr. Lou Flaspohler, MD

Direct Care Specialist · Co-founder, DSC Alliance

Co-founder of the DSC Alliance, practicing direct specialty care in Cincinnati, Ohio, and part of the direct care movement for 20 years.

What you will take away

The honest version of how this movement got built

  1. 01

    The real story of how direct specialty care went from a few individuals to a national movement.

  2. 02

    Why these physicians left insurance-based practice, and what changed for their patients when they did.

  3. 03

    The honest version: what was hard, what they would do differently, and what they wish they had known.

  4. 04

    Where the movement is headed, and how you fit into it.

  5. 05
    The live part

    Your questions, answered live by the founders.

Frequently Asked Questions

When is the webinar?

The Meet the Initiators webinar is on Thursday, July 23, 2026, at 3:00 PM PT / 4:00 PM MT / 5:00 PM CT / 6:00 PM ET. It is held live online. Register and we will email you the join link and a reminder before it begins.

How much does it cost to attend?

Nothing. The webinar is free, and live seats are capped at 100, so register early to hold your spot.

What if I cannot attend live?

Register anyway. We send the recording to everyone who registers. Come live if you can, because the founders answer your questions in the room, and that part only happens once.

Who are the initiators of the DSC Alliance?

The DSC Alliance was co-founded by Dr. Diana Girnita, Dr. Lara Briseno Kenney, and Dr. Lou Flaspohler, physicians who left insurance-based practice to build a transparent, direct model of specialty care and a community to support it.

Do I have to be a member to attend?

No. The webinar is open to any physician who wants to learn about direct specialty care and meet the founders. If you join as a founding member, you also get the Starter Guide, the recorded webinar library, the monthly newsletter, the private community, and a national directory listing with your place on our map.

Medicine the Way It Was Meant to Be.

Whether you are a specialist ready to reclaim your autonomy, or a patient who deserves more than 10 minutes with a doctor who actually knows your name, the DSC Alliance is where you belong.
